title: Misans平滑字体包FontPack(Bye Pixel Font~)
description: 无需Caxton或ModernUI模组，即可展示平滑字体，获得绝佳的清晰的阅读体验！Display smooth fonts for an excellent, crisp reading experience, no Caxton or ModernUI modules required!
body:
Misans平滑字体包 FontPack (Bye Pixel Font~)

让像素体说再见，给你清晰顺滑的阅读体验 ✨🅰️

> 无需 Caxton 或 ModernUI 等任何前置模组，即可展示平滑字体，获得绝佳、清晰的阅读体验！/ No Caxton or ModernUI required. Enjoy crisp, smooth text right away! --- ### 简介 💡 Misans平滑字体包是一个纯资源包（Resource Pack），专注于优化 Minecraft 的界面与聊天文字渲染，替换原版偏像素化的字体，带来清晰、现代、顺滑的阅读体验。定位为：资源包 / UI / 字体更改。 - 类型：资源包（字体/UI） - 核心：更换游戏字体为现代化平滑字体风格，提升可读性与观感 - 前置：不需要任何模组或加载器 ### 适配环境 ⚙️ - 适用范围：所有支持资源包字体替换的 Minecraft 版本（“能更换字体的所有 MC 版本”） - 平台：纯客户端资源包；与服务端无关 - 加载器：无依赖（不需要 Forge/Fabric/NeoForge/Quilt） ### 主要特性 ⭐ - 清晰顺滑：替代像素感强的默认字体，界面/聊天/告示牌阅读更舒适 - 即装即用：无需 Caxton / ModernUI / 任意前置，拖入资源包立刻生效 - 广泛覆盖：覆盖常见中英文字符与符号，适合中文与英文混排 - 兼容友好：几乎不影响性能；可与其他资源包共存（建议置顶以覆盖字体） - 纯客户端：加入服务器也无需让他人安装，个人本地生效 ### 安装方式 🚀 1. 将资源包文件放入 Minecraft 资源包目录： - Windows: ~/.minecraft/resourcepacks - macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/resourcepacks - Linux: ~/.minecraft/resourcepacks 2. 游戏内 前往 选项 → 资源包 → 启用本资源包。 3. 将该资源包移动到列表较高位置，确保覆盖其他“字体类资源包”。 ### 依赖与兼容 🔗 - 必需依赖：无 - 可选/不需要：Caxton、ModernUI（本包无需它们也能生效） - 对模组兼容：通常与绝大多数模组兼容；如某些模组在 UI 中使用自定义符号，可能出现个别对齐差异 ### 许可证 📜 - 资源包（打包与配置等）：CC BY-SA 4.0 - 字体来源：MiSans（小米字体），遵循其官方授权与使用条款 注：字体本身的授权以原作者/官方为准，CC BY-SA 仅适用于本资源包的非字体部分与配置。 ### 常见问题 ❓ - Q：需要安装在服务器吗？ A：无需。本资源包是纯客户端内容。 - Q：和其他资源包冲突吗？ A：若对方资源包也修改字体，请将本包放到更高优先级。 - Q：会影响性能吗？ A：几乎不影响。字体渲染开销极低。 --- ### Overview 💡 MiSans Smooth Font Pack is a pure resource pack that replaces Minecraft’s pixelated default font with a modern, crisp, and smooth typeface for better readability in UI and chat. Category: Resource Pack / UI / Font Override. - Type: Resource pack (font/UI) - Core: Replace in-game font with MiSans-style rendering for improved clarity - Prerequisites: None (no mods or loaders required) ### Compatibility ⚙️ - Works with: Any Minecraft versions that support resource-pack-based font replacement (“all MC versions capable of changing fonts”) - Side: Client-side only; server installation is not needed - Mod loaders: Not required (no Forge/Fabric/NeoForge/Quilt) ### Key Features ⭐ - Crisp and smooth text across UI, chat, signs, etc. - Plug-and-play: No Caxton/ModernUI required - Broad coverage for common Latin and Chinese characters - Friendly coexistence with other packs; minimal to no performance impact - Client-only: Your server mates don’t need it ### Installation 🚀 1. Place the pack into your Minecraft resourcepacks folder: - Windows: ~/.minecraft/resourcepacks - macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/resourcepacks - Linux: ~/.minecraft/resourcepacks 2. In game: Options → Resource Packs → Enable this pack. 3. Move it to a higher priority to ensure its font overrides others. 4. If you see missing glyphs/boxes, verify language settings and pack priority. ### Dependencies & Compatibility 🔗 - Required: None - Not needed: Caxton, ModernUI (this pack works without them) - Mod compatibility: Generally compatible; certain mods with custom glyphs may have minor alignment differences ### License 📜 - Pack (configs and packaging): CC BY-SA 4.0 - Font: MiSans by Xiaomi, subject to Xiaomi’s official license/terms Note: The font’s own license prevails; CC BY-SA applies to the non-font parts of this pack. ### FAQ ❓ - Q: Do I need it on servers? A: No. It’s client-side only. - Q: Conflicts with other packs? A: Place this pack above other font-changing packs. - Q: Performance impact? A: Negligible—font rendering is lightweight.
